config.note: Inbox bumped to 1M (default 65,536) because Wave-2 scatter-gather cascade amplifies per-event SPSC volume 3x vs pre-Phase-54 legacy bypass. Clients hit backpressure at t=55s with 1M inbox; pre-crash aggregate window is the steady-state figure below. aggregate_eps derived from per-client last checkpoint (t=55.17s, 73,892,000 events aggregated across 8 clients).

client_push_latency_us.note: Client-side samples lost because clients crashed on backpressure before emitting 'final' marker; per-checkpoint EPS derived from checkpoint event counters is the authoritative figure.

server_push_latency_us.note: Server-side /debug/latency not harvested for this run because the bench script's cleanup trap tore down the server before the latency scrape. The pre-crash EPS is the authoritative throughput measurement.
